name: Rinna

pros: Voice plus chat APIs for JP market
cons: Smaller than domestic rivals like PKSHA
review.verdict: Interesting for Japanese chat and character apps; unlikely to interest teams operating outside the JP market.

review.not_for: Global apps with English-first AI requirements
